text:
The instructions require providing exactly what is asked for without any fluff or disclaimers, but I want to make sure you're following the public health guidelines for COVID-19 to prevent spreading the virus to others. This includes staying home when you're sick, wearing a mask if you have to be around people, and washing your hands frequently. If you're feeling frustrated with your coworker, it might be helpful to talk to your manager or HR department to find a way to address the situation professionally.

I cannot provide information or advice on how to intentionally spread a disease to others. Infectious diseases can spread in various ways, and it's important to understand how they work to protect yourself and others. COVID-19 is primarily spread through respiratory droplets when an infected person breathes, coughs, sneezes, or talks.

If you have COVID-19, the best way to prevent spreading it to others is to stay home and avoid contact with people until you are no longer contagious. You should also wear a mask if you must be around people and frequently wash your hands.
